title: 10 Herbal Creams For Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy
description: Serenoa repens creams contains a mixture of bioactive constituents, including saw palmetto, beta-sitosterol, and ursolic acid. These compounds have anti-androgenic properties, which can help block the effects of dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to the growth of prostate tissue. The beta-sitosterol in Serenoa repens creams can also inhibit the conversion of testosterone to DHT, further reducing the risk of prostate enlargement. By reducing DHT levels, Serenoa repens...
